query_normalized: predicting the impact of cold work on recrystallization kinetics in aluminum alloys materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the specific mechanism of recrystallization kinetics in aluminum alloys (Al-Mn) following cold work (cold-rolled), directly measuring how microstructural features (dispersoids) influence the recovery and recrystallization process.
